project_info.name: Hephestos
project_info.tagline: We Build What Others Can't Automate

background.description: Near-black for depth and high-end feel.

colors.rules: Gradients and glows MUST exclusively use the accent colors. No flat #000000 pure black; rely on #080808.

headings.scale: H1 fluid up to text-5xl/text-6xl, H2 text-3xl/text-4xl

typography.rules: Since Inter is requested, break visual monotony with maximum weight contrast: headers must be font-black with tight tracking, overlines font-bold uppercase with wide tracking.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Main sections should use py-24 to py-32. Standard element gaps gap-6 or gap-8.
layout.grid_system: Bento grid approach. Ensure direct children for grid containers. Mobile-first grid-cols-1.

visual_enhancers.background_grid: Subtle glowing grid lines: implement using CSS `background-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(59,130,246,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(59,130,246,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px;` applied to an absolute inset wrapper.
visual_enhancers.particles: tsParticles wrapper in hero for forge ember effect. Particles should float upwards, glowing warm/blue.

motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion for scroll-triggered fade-in-up animations (`initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}` to `animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}`) on all sections and grid cards.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift (`-translate-y-1`) and border transitions to electric blue with a subtle glow.
motion_and_interactions.buttons: CTA buttons scale (`hover:scale-105`) and intensify their gradient glow.

components.navbar: Sticky top (z-50), glassmorphism effect. Includes Hephestos logo text, anchor links, and 'Book a Demo' CTA.
components.hero: min-h-screen relative flex items-center justify-center. Contains tsParticles canvas behind content. Massive H1 heading. Blue-violet radial gradient blur behind the text.
components.services: Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3). 6 cards. 1px solid border-white/10, gradient pill background behind line icons, hover lift + electric blue border glow.
components.industries: Flowing wrap layout (`flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-4`). Tag pills (`px-6 py-3 rounded-full border border-white/10 text-sm hover:border-[#7C3AED] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(124,58,237,0.4)] transition-all`).
components.how_it_works: 3-step horizontal flex timeline. Connector lines absolute behind nodes. Nodes are `w-12 h-12 rounded-full border-2 border-[#3B82F6] text-[#3B82F6]` with subtle glow.
components.why_hephestos: 3-column layout. Minimalist styling, Lucide/Phosphor line icons.
components.case_studies: 2 massive cards. Styling: `border-l-2 border-[#3B82F6] bg-white/[0.02] p-8`. Huge metric (`text-5xl font-black text-[#7C3AED]`).
components.about: Centered text layout. Subtle icon representing the forge (flame/anvil - use lucide-react 'Flame' or similar).
components.contact: Full-width dark section. Background has a large faint blue-violet radial gradient glow. Clean inputs (bg-transparent, border-white/20, focus:border-[#3B82F6]). Form state saves to DB.
components.footer: Simple clean bottom bar, subtle border-t border-white/10.

accessibility.data_testids: MANDATORY: Add `data-testid` to all major interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta"`, `data-testid="contact-submit"`).
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text opacity over dark backgrounds remains at least 70% to meet contrast guidelines.

media.instructions: NO STOCK PHOTOS. NO CLIPART. The visual identity relies ENTIRELY on the CSS glowing grid lines, tsParticles ember effect, pure typography, and high-end gradients. Icons should be React Icons or Lucide.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `@tsparticles/react`, `tsparticles`, and `framer-motion` if not already installed.
Build the one-page landing page entirely from scratch in HTML/Tailwind. Avoid standard Shadcn card components if they restrict custom glow effects.
Ensure `tsparticles` are configured with small dot shapes, upwards 'out' mode, and glowing colors to mimic the 'forge embers'.

Include a radial gradient blurred blob absolutely positioned in the center of the hero section behind the text (e.g. `w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500/20 to-violet-500/20 blur-[100px]`).
Ensure the contact form captures inputs properly, as requested ('stored to database' or stubbed appropriately).
